scores.rationale: Feedback incorrectly praises the essay’s structure and evidence while ignoring severe grammatical and logical flaws; suggestions are somewhat concrete but miss foundational issues.
Overly positive and inaccurate regarding the essay’s poor coherence; offers vague praise with no concrete steps to address actual writing problems.
Mirrors Variant 1’s misdiagnosis and generic advice; cuts off mid-sentence, severely limiting actionable guidance despite referencing specific essay content.
